---
title: "Hello, world"
description: "Why this site exists and what to expect."
date: "2026-06-27"
categories: [meta]
---

This is the first entry. The site is a working notebook — short writeups of
things I'm building (often with AI in the loop), stray thoughts, and Kaggle
logs.

Each entry is its own folder under `posts/`, so it can carry its own images,
data, and code. New entries show up on the home page automatically, newest
first.

## Adding a new entry

Create `posts/<slug>/index.qmd` with a date and a category, write, then push.
The GitHub Action renders and publishes the rest.
